full_text:
Liu Pan 劉磐
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Liu Pan (劉磐). Attempted guerilla warfare against Sun Ce but was foiled by Taishi Ci. Liu Pan was affiliated with Liu Biao and the Shu Kingdom.
